options.description: Flat array of items or grouped items. Each group has a label, optional icon, and an items array.

onChange.description: Change event handler called with {event, value, name, args}

placeholder.description: Placeholder text when no option is selected

emptyMessage.description: Message to display when no options are available

renderItem.description: Custom render function for dropdown items: (item, index, isSelected, isHighlighted) => ReactNode

renderValue.description: Custom render function for selected value: (item) => ReactNode

id.description: HTML id attribute for the input element

name.description: HTML name attribute for form submission

args.description: Custom arguments passed to onChange event

optionLabel.description: Property name to use as the display label from each option object

optionValue.description: Property name to use as the value from each option object
